description: Run a Great Expectations expectation suite — one Dagster asset check per expectation.

outputs.description: One AssetCheckResult per expectation in the suite

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key to attach the checks to

ge_context_root_dir.label: Ge Context Root Dir
ge_context_root_dir.description: Path to the Great Expectations project root

severity_override.label: Severity Override
severity_override.description: Optional — force every check to WARN or ERROR. Unset (default) means severity is read from each expectation's meta.severity field, defaulting to ERROR.

data_connector_name.label: Data Connector Name
data_connector_name.description: GE data connector name (rarely needs changing)

name: Great Expectations Check
